MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Linda Hurevitz, Esq., 818.508.3700 x3723, for defendant Dignity Health dba Mercy Hospitals of Bakersfield; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH DBA MERCY HOSPITALS OF BAKERSFIELD'S Motion To Transfer is granted. No opposition filed. Per the parties' stipulation, the case is transferred to Kern County and Defendant shall pay all costs for the transfer. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H.
